mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image AS coverImage, a.view_count, a.favorite_count, a.reading_time AS readingTime, u.username AS authorName, a.author_id AS authorId, a.create_time AS createTime, a.update_time AS updateTime FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_user u ON a.author_id = u.id AND u.del_flag = 0 WHERE a.del_flag = 0
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{authorName}, '%')
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image AS coverImage, a.view_count, a.favorite_count, a.reading_time AS readingTime, u.username AS authorName, a.author_id AS authorId, a.create_time AS createTime, a.update_time AS updateTime FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_user_article_favorites uaf ON a.id = uaf.article_id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON a.author_id = u.id AND u.del_flag = 0 WHERE a.del_flag = 0 AND uaf.del_flag = 0
AND uaf.user_id = #{userId}
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY uaf.create_time DESC
